points="400,780;240,820" priority="0" startNodeId="N22" startPosition="3"/> <line condition="$gsdm$ .equals( "1305") || $gsdm$ .equals( "1108") " disCondition="$开票方$ .equals( "1305") || $开票方$ .equals( <robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"sid","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fphm$","fieldText":"$发票信息$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fphm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$gsdm$","fieldText":"$开票方$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"gsdm","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$hcsply$","fieldText":"$红冲申请来源$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"hcsply","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$tzdbh$","fieldText":"$红票通知单编号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"tzdbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"process_url","defaultValue":""},{"field":"return ($fdId$+\"3\").replace($fdId$,\"\");","fieldText":"return ($ID$+\"3\").replace($ID$,\"\");","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"fply","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"httpCode","fieldText":"请求code","dataType":"String","fieldName":"code"},{"field":"httpmsg","fieldText":"http返回信息","dataType":"String","fieldName":"msg"}],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/SEDTFITOOL/dce-api/sedtfitool-service/pmp/api/invoice_kp/fphc?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","successParam":{"successFieldName":"state","successValue":"200"},"dataFieldName":"oaData"}" id="N6" name="红冲" unid="*@Robot@restRobotNode" x="400" y="1000"/>
